title: Full Inventory + Fork Products + Gap Analysis

entries.detail: content-studio pushed to sonoradigitalcorp-H/content-studio
omnivoice pushed to sonoradigitalcorp-H/omnivoice
open-notebook pushed to sonoradigitalcorp-H/open-notebook
SSH push failed (key had no access to org repos). Switched to HTTPS with GH_TOKEN
Total source files: ~3,045 (excluding node_modules, .git, backups, venv)
Landing/web pages: ~80+ HTML pages across products, apps, frontends, docs, clients
Apps: 20+ dirs under apps/ (SIGNAL, abe-service, jarvis, guardian, hermes, webui = production; observe/understand/learn/control = stubs)
PWAs: 3 (ABE Music, WebUI/Mystic, Yami)
MCPs: 30+ tools, 8 servers, gateway, auth, registry, scheduler, sandbox, providers, workflow(6), ADK(34 agents), SDK, CLI
CLIs: 2 (sdc, sonora) + 103 scripts
Skills: 20+ (11 top-level + 8 process + 8 capability handlers)
Tools: layered architecture (definitions → registry → 30 implementations → executor router → ADK bridge)
Agent registry: 11 agents in agents/registry.yaml + 34 ADK agents in mcp/adk/agents/
Process specs: 11 HAS files (HAS-000 through HAS-011) + 36 completed sessions
Tests: 78 (5 suites) in core
Revenue tracked: Hector Rubio ($460k), Javier Arvayo ($200), Jesus Urquijo ($18.5k)
prompts/prompts/OS/ directory does NOT exist — 10 Sub-OS prompts missing (Sales, Dev, Support, Agent, Knowledge, Finance, Security, Ops, Quality, Strategy)
AGENTS.md references prompts/prompts/OS/ paths that are broken
capabilities/*/prompts/ — all 8 directories empty
apps/observe/ (Level 1 Kernel) — stub only
apps/understand/ (Level 2 Kernel) — stub only
apps/control/ (Level 7 Kernel) — stub only
apps/learn/ (Level 6 Kernel) — only heuristics.py + evolution/
manuals/ directory does not exist — no user/admin manuals
evolution/prompts/ directory is empty
mcp/plugins/, mcp/security/, mcp/swarm/, mcp/alerts/, mcp/achievements/, mcp/chaos/, mcp/templates/ — all partial
apps/act/ (Level 4) — has modules but incomplete
apps/measure/ (Level 5) — has HTML but incomplete
apps/agents/ — stub only
apps/voice/ — pipeline partial
SSH key on VPS belongs to user account; for pushing to org repos need HTTPS with token or deploy key with org access
GitHub API (gh) works with OAuth token even when SSH push fails
fork-product.sh script automates extracting any product dir into standalone repo
15 active services on VPS (ports 3900-8768 + Neo4j, Qdrant, n8n)
